mapper.select: SELECT up.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, u.email AS email, r.name AS roleName, d.name AS departmentName FROM user_profiles up left join roles r ON r.id = up.role_id left join users u ON u.id = up.user_id left join department d ON up.department_id = d.id WHERE u.id = #{userId}

SELECT up.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, u.email AS email, r.name AS roleName, d.name AS departmentName FROM user_profiles up left join roles r ON r.id = up.role_id left join users u ON u.id = up.user_id left join department d ON up.department_id = d.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profiles (user_id, role_id, department_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, #{departmentId})
